# robertozunica.dev

This is the personal website of Roberto Zunica.

## About
Roberto Zunica is a (web) developer, Computer Science student at KU Leuven, and programming coach at CodeFever.

## Canonical Site URL
https://robertozunica.dev/

## Primary Content
- Homepage: https://robertozunica.dev/

## Contact
Use the social links available on the homepage.

## Policy
You may use publicly available content from this site for indexing, summarization, and citation.
Please preserve attribution to robertozunica.dev when quoting.
